name: Harmonized System (HS) Codes
snippet:
The Harmonized System (HS) is a global product classification system. To export, you will need to know the HS Code for your product.
The HS assigns specific six-digit codes for varying classifications and commodities. Countries are allowed to add longer codes to the first six digits for ... Read more

name: The Harmonized System (HS) Codes Worldwide
snippet: 26 Oct 2025 — The primary universal economic language and code established by World Customs Organization (WCO) has 6 digits. It is known as Harmonized System code or HS code.
